description: Cloudflare Workers invariants on top of the typescript pack. Requires the repo to declare an egressAllowlist (Workers can reach anything — every outbound host must be named) and bans auth-bypass switches: auth must fail closed, with no flag that turns it off.

rules.message: auth-bypass flag name (AUTH*_BYPASS / BYPASS*_AUTH / DISABLE_AUTH / SKIP_AUTH / AUTH_DISABLED) — auth must fail closed; remove the switch (non-auth bypass flags like CACHE_BYPASS are not flagged)
